title: Problem calculate observed and expected limits from crab output grid files

posts.name: Danyi Zhang
posts.text:
Dear experts,
I’m trying to follow the instructions on the grid submission with crab3. I did the same steps and commands as the tutorial, submitted crab jobs, and they finished without errors.
After that, I performed an hadd operation on the output files from the crab jobs, as required at the end of the instructions. Then I tried to run the commands here to calculate the expected and observed limits. However, both commands gave me the same error:
(twoD-env) dazhang@uaf-2 crab_B1_MD2000_MBH10000_n2 $ combine card.root -M HybridNew --LHCmode LHC-limits --readHybridResults --grid=merged.root --expectedFromGrid 0.5 -v 2

>>> Random number generator seed is 123456
>>> using the Profile Likelihood test statistic modified for upper limits (Q_LHC)
>>> Method used is HybridNew
Search for upper limit using pre-computed grid of p-values
GRID, as is.

Caught exception The grid must contain at least 2 points.
0 log messages saved to combine_logger.out

I attached the card.root file converted from the datacard, and the merged grid file merged.root. Could you please look into this issue?
card.root (36.1 KB)
merged.root (171.1 KB)
Thank you for your help!
Best,
Danyi
posts.cooked_html:
Dear experts,

I’m trying to follow the instructions on the grid submission with crab3. I did the same steps and commands as the tutorial, submitted crab jobs, and they finished without errors.

After that, I performed an hadd operation on the output files from the crab jobs, as required at the end of the instructions. Then I tried to run the commands here to calculate the expected and observed limits. However, both commands gave me the same error:

(twoD-env) dazhang@uaf-2 crab_B1_MD2000_MBH10000_n2 $ combine card.root -M HybridNew --LHCmode LHC-limits --readHybridResults --grid=merged.root --expectedFromGrid 0.5 -v 2

>>> Random number generator seed is 123456
>>> using the Profile Likelihood test statistic modified for upper limits (Q_LHC)
>>> Method used is HybridNew
Search for upper limit using pre-computed grid of p-values
GRID, as is.

Caught exception The grid must contain at least 2 points.
0 log messages saved to combine_logger.out

I attached the card.root file converted from the datacard, and the merged grid file merged.root. Could you please look into this issue?

card.root (36.1 KB)
merged.root (171.1 KB)

Thank you for your help!

Best,
Danyi

posts.name: Danyi Zhang
posts.text: For your reference, I’m using Combine version v10.0.1.
posts.cooked_html: For your reference, I’m using Combine version v10.0.1.

posts.name: Tamas Almos Vami
posts.text:
Hi @nckw @gortona , all,
do you have any suggestions for this?
Thanks,
Tamas
posts.cooked_html:
Hi @nckw @gortona , all,
do you have any suggestions for this?

Thanks,
Tamas

posts.name: Andrea Carlo Marini
posts.text:
Can you share the command you used to generate the grid?
It should look like this plus the grid submission from combineTools
-A
posts.cooked_html:
Can you share the command you used to generate the grid?
It should look like this plus the grid submission from combineTools

-A

posts.name: Danyi Zhang
posts.text:
Yes! Here is the command:
combineTool.py -d card.root -M HybridNew --LHCmode LHC-limits --clsAcc 0 -T 2000 -s -1 --singlePoint 0.01:0.21:0.02 --saveToys --saveHybridResult -m 125 --job-mode crab3 --task-name grid-test --custom-crab ../custom_crab.py
posts.cooked_html:
Yes! Here is the command:

combineTool.py -d card.root -M HybridNew --LHCmode LHC-limits --clsAcc 0 -T 2000 -s -1 --singlePoint 0.01:0.21:0.02 --saveToys --saveHybridResult -m 125 --job-mode crab3 --task-name grid-test --custom-crab ../custom_crab.py

posts.name: Danyi Zhang
posts.text:
Hello Andrea,
We figured out the solution is to add the option --mass 125 when running the limits.
Thank you for your time!
Best,
Danyi
posts.cooked_html:
Hello Andrea,

We figured out the solution is to add the option --mass 125 when running the limits.

Thank you for your time!

Best,
Danyi
